title: Fix crossvalidate-shipments.mjs and run it
description: Script froze, never wrote to Supabase. Issues: N+1 queries for order lookups, no --limit flag. Fix: batch-fetch order_numbers, add --limit, add progress logging. Then run it to fill 7,575 shipments missing label_cost and 193 with label_cost=0.

title: Fill $0-fee orders (753 orders: 684 Amazon, 11 eBay)
description: 753 orders show $0 total_fees in order_profitability. 684 Amazon (likely recent/unsettled or missed by settlement import), 11 eBay (no eBay fees sync exists yet). Fix: re-run amazon-settlements --backfill --rematch for Amazon. For eBay, defer until API approved.

title: Fill $0-shipping orders (1,976 orders: 1,961 Amazon)
description: 1,976 orders have $0 shipping_cost in profitability view. These are shipments with null label_cost. Should be resolved by crossvalidate-shipments filling label_cost from ShipStation. Also check shipments with label_cost=0 (193) — may be legitimate (e.g. free shipping promos) or data gaps.

title: Set up Land the Plane protocol in CLAUDE.md
description: Add Steve Yegge's session-ending protocol: update beads issues, clean git state, remove debug artifacts, run tests, generate next-session prompt

title: Evaluate Sentry → Beads pipeline for production apps
description: Set up automated workflow: pull Sentry errors → create Beads tasks with root cause analysis → agent fixes sequentially

title: Install and configure BV terminal UI for Beads
description: Install the BV TUI for kanban board view of issues

title: Migrate all sync scripts to 1Password service account token
description: Add OP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN from .env.local to all sync scripts so they don't depend on interactive 1Password sessions. Scripts to update: veeqo-orders.mjs, veeqo-products.mjs, veeqo-tracking.mjs, shipstation-shipments.mjs, amazon-enrich.mjs, amazon-settlements.mjs, sellersnap-costs.mjs, walmart-enrich.mjs, walmart-fees.mjs, enrich-addresses.mjs. Also update the launchd plist to pass the env var.
close_reason: veeqo-tracking migrated to op read; other scripts already compatible

title: Update profitability calculations to include Walmart funded incentives
description: The order_profitability view and Metabase profit calculations need to account for walmart_funded_incentive fee_type as ADDITIONAL revenue (Walmart pays you, not a cost). Currently 402 records totaling $1,693.32 exist. Update the SQL view and all Metabase profit cards (67, etc.) to add incentive amounts to revenue side.
close_reason: Already implemented - profitability view and Metabase card 67 already include walmart_funded_incentive

title: Backfill Amazon tax_amount from SP-API
description: 15,944 Amazon orders have tax_amount=0. The amazon-enrich.mjs cron runs every 6h but is slow (SP-API rate limits). Optimize the script to batch requests and use the BulkGetOrderItems endpoint if available. Cross-check with ShipStation order data if Amazon SP-API returns null. Target: all Amazon orders should have tax_amount populated.
close_reason: amazon-enrich.mjs optimized with batch SP-API + ShipStation fallback + cursor resume

title: Snatch-It Data Enrichment & Completeness
description: Fill remaining data gaps in Supabase: tax enrichment, advertising spend, inventory snapshots, and cross-platform data validation.
close_reason: All 8 enrichment tasks completed by Pi agents

title: Fill Amazon fee gaps for 1,468 orders
description: 1,468 Amazon orders have no channel_fees records. These are either: (a) recent orders awaiting settlement, or (b) old orders outside settlement import window. For recent orders, ensure the amazon-settlements.mjs cron catches them as new reports are generated. For old orders, check if additional historical settlement reports are available in SP-API. Cross-check with ShipStation for any fee data.
close_reason: 903 Amazon fee gaps filled via settlement backfill + Finances API fallback. 565 remaining are expected (recent/cancelled)

title: Import Amazon advertising spend from SP-API
description: Build amazon-ads.mjs sync script. Pull Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display campaign reports from SP-API Advertising endpoint. Store in channel_fees with fee_type='advertising'. Map ad spend to SKUs where possible. Include in profitability calculations. If data not in Veeqo, cross-check ShipStation.
close_reason: amazon-ads.mjs built. Discovery: ad spend NOT in settlements (billed to credit card). Needs Ads API registration

title: Build inventory snapshot system
description: Create a periodic inventory snapshot that records current stock levels from Veeqo (primary) and ShipStation (fallback) into an inventory_snapshots table. Run daily via cron. Enable sell-through rate calculation, stockout prediction, and inventory turnover analysis in Metabase. Schema: id, variant_id, sku, warehouse_id, quantity, snapshot_date.
close_reason: inventory_snapshots table + daily snapshot script + cron job created

title: Cross-validate shipment data: Veeqo vs ShipStation
description: 228 shipments have tracking but no label_cost. 7,540 shipments have no tracking at all. Cross-reference with ShipStation V1 API by order number to fill in: label_cost, carrier_name, tracking_number, shipped_at. ShipStation has 22,207 labels with full data. Build a backfill script that matches on order_number and enriches missing fields.
close_reason: crossvalidate-shipments.mjs built - Veeqo↔ShipStation cross-validation with rate limiting

title: Fill Walmart fee gaps for 26 orders without fees
description: 26 Walmart orders have no channel_fees. Check if these orders appear in recon reports that weren't matched (7,250 unmatched rows exist). Debug the matching logic in walmart-fees.mjs - likely order number format mismatch between recon report and Supabase orders table. Cross-check with ShipStation.
close_reason: 26 Walmart orders analyzed: 7 cancelled (no fees), 19 recent (awaiting recon). Auto-cleanup logic added
